transcript: Speaker A: Nuvvu na 4 years of college lo 4 English words kuda sarigga nerchukoledu. Ippudu job kavali ani nenu ninnu adugutunna. [In my 4 years of college, I didn't even learn 4 English words properly. Now I'm asking you because I need a job.] Speaker B: Arey niku enni sarlu cheppinara, nuvvu ye company lo job cheyyalanna, first nuvvu ela communicate cheyyagalgutav anedi chustaru vallu. Work em undi, evaranna nerchukuntaru. [Hey, how many times have I told you? Whichever company you want to work for, they first look at how you communicate. What's there in work? Anyone can learn it.] Speaker B: Mawa vinu, manaki inka chala time undi. Niku manchi app gurinchi chepta, SPEAK X. Fast ga velli download chesko. [Listen buddy, we still have plenty of time. I'll tell you about a good app, SPEAK X. Go download it quickly.] Speaker B: Dintlo nuvvu roju just 10 mins AI teacher tho matladite chalu, interview lo first class English matladachu. [In this, if you just talk to the AI teacher for 10 minutes daily, you can speak first-class English in the interview.] Speaker B: Inkenduku late chestunnav mawa, fast ga velli SPEAK X app download chesi English practice chesko. [Why are you delaying buddy? Go quickly, download the SPEAK X app and practice English.]
on_screen_text: Nuu na 4yrs of clg / 4 English words kuda sarigga nerchuko ledhu / Ippudu job kavali ani nenu ninnu adugutunna / arey niku enni sarlu cheppinara / Nuvvu ye company lo job cheyyalanna / First nuvvu ela / communicate cheyyagalgutav anedi chustaru vallu / Work em undi / Evvaranna nerchukuta / Mawa vinu manaki inka chaala tym undhi / Niku manchi app gurinchi cheptha / SPEAK X / Fast ga velli download chesko / Dintlo nuvvu roju juri just 10 mins AI teacher tho matladite chalu / interview lo first class English matladachu / Inkendhu late chestunnav mawa fast ga velli / SPEAK X app download chesi... / English practice chesko
summary: A college graduate worries about his poor English skills affecting his job search. His friend advises that communication is key and recommends practicing 10 minutes daily with the SpeakX AI teacher app to clear interviews.
